recommendations.title: 3 Hearts
recommendations.overview: A twist of fate leaves a hapless accountant romantically torn between two sisters.

recommendations.title: Eva
recommendations.overview: A playwright encounters a mysterious woman when he takes shelter in a chalet during a violent snowstorm and becomes obsessed with her.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Chambermaid
recommendations.overview: In the late 19th century, a chambermaid from Paris relocates to a remote household in Provence, engages in trysts and finds herself enraptured with a coach driver.

recommendations.title: Loving Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young man arrives at the last hometown of painter Vincent van Gogh to deliver the troubled artist's final letter and ends up investigating his final days there.

recommendations.title: The Ideal Palace
recommendations.overview: Follows Joseph Ferdinand Chavel a French postman who built a palace in the French countryside over 33 years.

recommendations.title: Dallas Buyers Club
recommendations.overview: Loosely based on the true-life tale of Ron Woodroof, a drug-taking, women-loving, homophobic man who in 1986 was diagnosed with HIV/AIDS and given thirty days to live.

recommendations.title: Once in a Lifetime
recommendations.overview: At Léon Blum High School in Créteil, France, a history teacher decides to have her weakest 10th grade class participate in a national history competition.

recommendations.title: A Royal Affair
recommendations.overview: A young queen falls in love with her physician, and they start a revolution that changes their nation forever.

recommendations.title: Babette's Feast
recommendations.overview: A French housekeeper with a mysterious past brings quiet revolution in the form of one exquisite meal to a circle of starkly pious villagers in late 19th century Denmark.

recommendations.title: Monsters University
recommendations.overview: A look at the relationship between Mike and Sulley during their days at Monsters University — when they weren't necessarily the best of friends.
